title: Morganton Shooting Claims Teen's Life
summary: An 18-year-old was killed and a 47-year-old injured in a shooting in Morganton. No arrests have been made.
charlotte_impact: Highlights the ongoing issue of gun violence and its devastating impact on young people and the community.

title: Duke Energy Offers Home Energy Assessments

title: Mecklenburg County Jail North to Reopen Amid Overcrowding
